characters.description: Pit’s bonded partner and an unusual defender of Harwatch. He awakens beneath the ruined cathedral with more power than his body can safely contain and struggles to stabilize it.
characters.name: Felix Nevarre

characters.description: Felix’s bonded companion, found alive and recovering beneath Harwatch’s ruined cathedral. Their connection makes Pit an important source of support while Felix struggles to control the power accumulated during the preceding battle.
characters.name: Pit

characters.description: A chanter who changes her appearance and adopts the identity Zara Cyrene before seeking the scattered Unbound in Harwatch. She has a close, family-like bond with Morvim and pursues a Guild position as part of her search.
characters.name: Zara Cyrene

characters.description: One of Felix’s displaced allies. Zara confirms that Vessilia escaped the failed domain and reached the warehouse camp with the other survivors. Her safety is one of Felix’s first concerns after he returns to the city.
characters.name: Vessilia Dayne

characters.description: A chain fighter and one of Felix’s close allies. She survives the domain collapse and reaches the warehouse camp with the other refugees. Her presence confirms that Felix’s companions escaped the cathedral disaster.
characters.name: Evie Aren

characters.description: The practical leader of the warehouse refugee camp. Cal organizes its barricades, patrols, and volunteer training while Harwatch is overrun by revenants. Her improvised forces give displaced residents a measure of protection.
characters.name: Cal

characters.description: A healer working at Cal’s warehouse camp. She treats injured patrol members as the refugee settlement struggles with mounting casualties and scarce resources. Her care supports the volunteers protecting the barricades.
characters.name: Portia

characters.description: Harwatch’s former Elder of Acquisitions, now using the title of Inquisitor. She consolidates control over the surviving local order in the Sunrise Quarter and treats the citywide disaster as an opportunity to command people and resources.
characters.name: Eliza DuFont

characters.description: An Inquisitor who presses DuFont to resume executions for heresy.
characters.name: Huthorn

characters.description: A power linked to Felix through the blood gate in an ancient temple. She says she has guided his advancement choices and warns that his growing influence will attract dangerous enemies. She directs him toward temples of lost gods but cautions him against trusting them.
characters.name: Vellus

characters.description: A veteran survivor and field leader trusted with Felix’s account of the Maw, the Unbound, and the threat approaching Harwatch. He joins the camp leadership in preparing its defense and assessing the expected attack.
characters.name: Harn

characters.description: Felix’s combat trainer. Rory uses an adaptive gauntlet to test movement, control, and spell accuracy while Felix’s unstable core makes even familiar actions unreliable. His exercises expose how much control Felix still lacks.
characters.name: Rory

characters.description: An ancient construct confined within gilded armor and bound by a curse. It sends three creations toward Harwatch, seeking agents, a lost key, and a way past the city’s old wall. Its siphon arrays are already drawing mana from the surrounding land.
characters.name: The Archon

characters.description: The Duke of Pax Rell’s Hand and Vessilia’s assigned protector. An Adept-tier combatant, he attempts to control her training and movements on her father’s authority. Vessilia openly rejects his effort to forbid Zara’s instruction.
characters.name: Darius Reed

characters.description: A fire mage and ally of Felix who lies unconscious in the camp healer’s ward. He is among the patients most severely affected by corruption carried out of the failed domain, and Portia has neither enough supplies nor a cure.
characters.name: Atar V'as

characters.description: One of Felix’s allies. He is unconscious in the healer’s ward and suffers from an especially heavy concentration of domain-related corruption. His condition is among the camp healers’ most serious cases.
characters.name: Alistair

characters.description: The warehouse camp’s heavily armored guard captain. He coordinates volunteer patrols and directs work on the settlement’s inadequate fortifications. Felix reports to him when offering practical help with the camp’s defenses.
characters.name: Bodhi

characters.description: A gnome illusionist and independent magical-shop proprietor recruited for the mine rescue. His Adept-tier concealment magic allows a group to pass through an area without drawing observers’ attention.
characters.name: Thaddeus Thangle

characters.description: A former bronze-rank Guild alchemist who reaches the rescued mine with six apprentices. She brings valuable expertise to the refugee effort, though she is openly critical of the group’s combat methods.
characters.name: Aenea Tillil

characters.description: Aenea’s husband and a bronze-rank sigilder nearing silver rank in his specialty. He adapts the mine’s wards against further attacks and joins the camp’s defensive work. His expertise helps secure the newly recovered source of ore.
characters.name: Hector

characters.description: The primordial presence previously connected to Felix. The revenants killed beneath the cathedral leave ruby remnants that he recognizes as echoes of the Maw, tying the city’s new threat to that lingering power.
characters.name: The Maw

characters.description: A goblin merchant who escapes the Inquisition roundup at the Drum Tank Inn in a wagon with other refugees. Their flight ends in a crash while red-cloak acolytes pursue them.
characters.name: Knuckle

characters.description: A Sworn operative who uses a face-changing mask to enter the warehouse camp as a rescued washerwoman. She secretly gathers tactical information for her employer and carries a personal vendetta against Zara.
characters.name: Ilya

characters.description: Alistair's iron-ranked cousin and an augmentation mage among the Guild force at the pump station. Holding Felix responsible for Harwatch's disaster, she stirs the other guilders into opposing him.
characters.name: Lillian

characters.description: A Guild Elder who coerces a party into investigating a pump house. The Elder uses a dangerous tracking device to follow an unknown trail into a deep route beneath Harwatch.
characters.name: Guild Elder

characters.description: A severely corrupted religious leader rescued near the warehouse camp. She identifies the revenant nest beneath the primary pump station, but an unresolved anomaly leaves her account under suspicion.
characters.name: Chorister of Siva

characters.description: The transformed identity of the Chorister of Siva. She summons revenants and ghouls, injures Pit, and uses the companion bond to harm Felix. Felix strips away her primordial power and restores her human form.
characters.name: Deceit of Misfortune

characters.description: An injured Elder of the Protectors Guild found with the hidden underground group. She explains that the group kept the Scale of the Ravager King because it repelled lesser monsters.
characters.name: Olivia Regis

characters.description: The full identity of Cal, revealed publicly by Eliza DuFont during the battle for Harwatch. Kaleska leads one branch of the assault and is an eligible challenger for the city’s territorial authority, even as DuFont traps the allies inside her defenses.
characters.name: Kaleska Bosco

characters.description: An Archid deployed inside DuFont’s trap alongside another construct and a large Reforged force. Felix calls it Mud before the blood moon magnifies the attackers.
characters.name: Mud

characters.description: The second Archid waiting with the Reforged inside DuFont’s enclosure. Felix calls the construct Skeleton before the blood moon greatly increases the enemy force’s size and power.
characters.name: Skeleton

characters.description: A colossal Archonic Construct advancing on Harwatch’s shield wall. It breaks free from a restraining array by absorbing its heat and continues toward the city’s defenders. Its immense metal body carries the Archon’s attack into the final battle.
characters.name: Apollyon

characters.description: An elderly chanter with a close, family-like bond to Zara. He joins her discussion of sabotaging the Unbound summoning so those called by it will be scattered.
characters.name: Morvim

characters.description: A returning survivor of the Foglands who leads one of Cal's volunteer patrols through Harwatch.
characters.name: Yan

characters.description: An Inquisitor aligned with Huthorn who demands the immediate return of executions for heresy.
characters.name: Rutger

characters.description: A former Chorister of Yarrow transformed into a powerful primordial spawn.
characters.name: Pride of Blight

characters.description: An immobile primordial spawn at the heart of the nest. Its eggs produce fully grown revenants, and its strength comes from the thousands of creatures surrounding it.
characters.name: Larval Broodmother
